<features>
- long whiskers: present
- large ears: present
- yellow eyes: present
- brown and gray fur: present
- white fur: present
</features>
<kb>
- IF [long whiskers = present AND large ears = present AND yellow eyes = present AND brown and gray fur = present AND white fur = present] THEN [20]
- IF [long whiskers = absent AND large ears = present AND tongue = present AND white fur = present] THEN [29]
- IF [long whiskers = absent AND large ears = absent AND brown and white fur = present] THEN [28]
- IF [long whiskers = absent AND large ears = present AND black and white fur = absent AND brown and white fur = absent] THEN [13]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 20 fires for the Query Image because it has long whiskers, large ears, yellow eyes, brown and gray fur, and white fur.
</rule_check>
<response>20</response>
